page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc9i.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture compute-optimized server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores with 8 vCPUs, utilizing a 1-to-1 thread-to-core ratio that ensures no hyperthreading resource sharing. The instance is powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor operating at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz, paired with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, requiring external block storage for operating system and application deployment. Network connectivity is supported by an 8 Gbps baseline bandwidth. The dedicated CPU allocation model provides predictable compute performance, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads that require consistent CPU execution without the performance fluctuations associated with shared-core or multi-threaded environments.

Given the compute-heavy ratio of 2.0 GB RAM per vCPU and the high-frequency Intel Xeon processor, this server type is suited for compute-intensive workloads, batch processing, web serving, and application servers that do not require large memory footprints or local storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc9i.2xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized server instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs, running an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor at 3.4 GHz with no hyperthreading. The instance provides 16.0 GB of RAM, resulting in a 2.0 GB per core memory ratio. It features an 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, contains no local storage, and has no onboard GPU. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures stable, predictable processing performance. This configuration is qualitatively cost-efficient for compute-bound workloads that require dedicated CPU resources without the overhead of hyperthreading. It is suited for applications such as web serving, batch processing, and general compute tasks.
